name: ast-grep-outline
description: Amp plugin that exposes ast-grep outline as an agent tool for fast structural code navigation.

scripts.amp:build: bun build src/amp/plugin.ts --target=node --format=esm --banner '// @amp-plugin updated automatically from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dallenpyrah/ast-grep-outline/main/dist/amp/ast-grep-outline.ts' --outfile=dist/amp/ast-grep-outline.ts
